SDK / API / 对外扩展点

状态已完成
难度中等
预计阅读40 分钟
源文件markdown/12-sdk-api-extension.md

Agent 生成档案

Section titled “Agent 生成档案”
  • 章节 ID：12-sdk-api-extension
  • 章节摘要：理解 HTTP API、generated SDK、plugin hooks 和扩展点如何让外部程序接入 OpenCode。
  • 章节元数据：/data/chapters.json
  • 源码映射：/data/source-map.json

主要源码路径

Section titled “主要源码路径”
  • packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/session.ts
  • packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
  • packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
  • packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts
  • packages/plugin/src/index.ts

对应模块：study-output/02-opencode-function-outline.md 的 “2.12 SDK / API / 对外扩展点”。
主要源码：packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts、packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts、packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts、packages/plugin/src/index.ts、packages/plugin/src/tool.ts。

0. 本章学习目标

Section titled “0. 本章学习目标”

这一章要理解 OpenCode 如何把内部 agent runtime 暴露给外部世界。

学完你应该能说清：

  • HTTP API 如何按 group 组合成 Root/Instance/Event/Pty/OpenCode API。
  • server routes 如何把 API handlers 和 runtime services 装配到 Effect layer。
  • SDK client 如何包装 generated client，并注入 directory header。
  • SDK server helper 如何启动 opencode serve 或 TUI。
  • Event API 如何用 SSE 输出 Bus events。
  • Plugin 系统如何加载内部/外部插件，提供 SDK client、project/worktree/serverUrl，并触发 hooks。
  • Tool 插件 API 如何让外部插件提供新工具。

1. 一句话讲明白

Section titled “1. 一句话讲明白”

SDK / API / 扩展层是 OpenCode 的“外部接口层”：server 用 Effect HTTP API 把 session、file、provider、permission、event 等能力组合成 typed API；JS SDK 包装 generated client 给 CLI/UI/插件使用；插件系统把 SDK、项目上下文和 hook trigger 暴露给外部模块，让外部代码能参与 provider、tool、shell.env、chat.params、event 等扩展点。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62、packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240、packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150、packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274。

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62 
30export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")对外暴露模块成员。31  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)32  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)读写本地文件。33  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。34  .middleware(Authorization)执行前先处理中间件。3536export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")对外暴露模块成员。37  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)38  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)39  .addHttpApi(FileApi)40  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)41  .addHttpApi(McpApi)42  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)43  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)44  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)45  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)46  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)选择模型或 provider。47  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)48  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)49  .addHttpApi(V2Api)50  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)51  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)52  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。5354export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")对外暴露模块成员。55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])6061export type RootHttpApiType = typeof RootHttpApi定义数据结构约束。62export type InstanceHttpApiType = typeof InstanceHttpApi定义数据结构约束。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
182export function createRoutes(对外暴露模块成员。183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(返回给上一层。186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,处理语言服务诊断。201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,调用插件扩展点。206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。208      Provider.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,读写本地文件。234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )
packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {创建 SDK 客户端。34  if (!config?.fetch) {按条件进入分支。35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)返回给上一层。39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {按条件进入分支。47    config.headers = {读取运行配置。48      ...config.headers,读取运行配置。49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),读取运行配置。50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)创建 SDK 客户端。54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })返回给上一层。57}
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55 
43export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。44  readonly trigger: <调用插件扩展点。45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(49    name: Name,50    input: Input,51    output: Output,52  ) => Effect.Effect<Output>Effect 异步工作流。53  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Hooks[]>Effect 异步工作流。54  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。55}
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))Effect 异步工作流。127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),复用后端请求入口。133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()读取运行配置。135        const input: PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {调用插件扩展点。142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")返回给上一层。147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <调用插件扩展点。262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output按条件进入分支。267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {调用插件扩展点。269        const fn = hook[name] as any调用插件扩展点。270        if (!fn) continue按条件进入分支。271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))Effect 异步工作流。272      }273      return output返回给上一层。274    })

2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置

Section titled “2. 它在 OpenCode agent 中的位置”

这一层位于 runtime 外围：

关键判断：

  • OpenCodeHttpApi 是 Root、Event、Instance、PtyConnect 的组合。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:54-59。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:54-59 
    54export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")对外暴露模块成员。55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])

  • createRoutes 把 handlers 和大量 runtime service layer 组合起来。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
    182export function createRoutes(对外暴露模块成员。183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(返回给上一层。186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,处理语言服务诊断。201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,调用插件扩展点。206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。208      Provider.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,读写本地文件。234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )

  • SDK createOpencodeClient 在 client interceptor 中改写 directory query。来源：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31、packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57。

    packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31 
    17function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {定义一段可复用逻辑。18  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request按条件进入分支。1920  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)21  if (!value) return request按条件进入分支。2223  const url = new URL(request.url)24  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {按条件进入分支。25    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)26  }2728  const next = new Request(url, request)29  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")30  return next返回给上一层。31}
    packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
    33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {创建 SDK 客户端。34  if (!config?.fetch) {按条件进入分支。35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)返回给上一层。39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {按条件进入分支。47    config.headers = {读取运行配置。48      ...config.headers,读取运行配置。49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),读取运行配置。50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)创建 SDK 客户端。54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })返回给上一层。57}

  • Plugin input 里直接给插件一个 SDK client 和 project/worktree/directory/serverUrl。来源：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150。

    packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
    126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))Effect 异步工作流。127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),复用后端请求入口。133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()读取运行配置。135        const input: PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {调用插件扩展点。142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")返回给上一层。147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }

3. 生活类比

Section titled “3. 生活类比”

如果 agent runtime 是公司内部各部门，那么 API/SDK 是对外服务大厅：

  • HTTP API 是窗口编号和办理事项。
  • SDK 是客户拿到的一本“办事小程序”，不用自己拼 URL。
  • SSE event 是排队叫号屏。
  • Plugin 是外包团队的入驻机制：给它工牌、内部系统客户端和规则，允许它在指定 hook 点参与工作。

4. Java 开发者类比

Section titled “4. Java 开发者类比”
  • HttpApiGroup 像 Spring Controller group。
  • HttpApiEndpoint 像 @PostMapping + request/response schema。
  • handlers 像 Controller method 调 Service。
  • Effect Layer 装配像 Spring Boot auto configuration / application context。
  • JS SDK 像 OpenAPI generated client + wrapper。
  • EventApi SSE 像 Spring WebFlux text/event-stream。
  • Plugin hook 像 SPI + application events + interceptor。

5. 最小源码路径

Section titled “5. 最小源码路径”
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67：in-process Server.Default().app.fetch。
packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67 
58export const Default = lazy(() => {对外暴露模块成员。59  const handler = HttpApiApp.webHandler().handler60  const app: ServerApp = {61    fetch: (request: Request) => handler(request, HttpApiApp.context),62    request(input, init) {63      return app.fetch(input instanceof Request ? input : new Request(new URL(input, "http://localhost"), init))返回给上一层。64    },65  }66  return { app }返回给上一层。67})
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:75-100：listen 对外启动 HTTP server。
packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:75-100 
75export async function listen(opts: ListenOptions): Promise<Listener> {对外暴露模块成员。76  const listener = await Effect.runPromise(listenEffect(opts))Effect 异步工作流。77  return {返回给上一层。78    hostname: listener.hostname,79    port: listener.port,80    url: listener.url,81    stop: (close?: boolean) => Effect.runPromiseExit(listener.stop(close)).then(() => undefined),Effect 异步工作流。82  }83}8485const listenEffect: (opts: ListenOptions) => Effect.Effect<EffectListener, unknown> = Effect.fn("Server.listen")(Effect 异步工作流。86  function* (opts: ListenOptions) {定义一段可复用逻辑。87    const state = yield* startWithPortFallback(opts)等待 Effect 结果。88    const address = yield* tcpAddress(state)等待 Effect 结果。89    const listenerUrl = makeURL(opts.hostname, address.port)90    url = listenerUrl9192    const unpublishMdns = yield* setupMdns(opts, address.port, state.scope)等待 Effect 结果。9394    return {返回给上一层。95      hostname: opts.hostname,96      port: address.port,97      url: listenerUrl,98      stop: yield* makeStop(state, unpublishMdns),等待 Effect 结果。99    }100  },
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62：API group 组合。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-62 
30export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")对外暴露模块成员。31  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)32  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)读写本地文件。33  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。34  .middleware(Authorization)执行前先处理中间件。3536export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")对外暴露模块成员。37  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)38  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)39  .addHttpApi(FileApi)40  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)41  .addHttpApi(McpApi)42  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)43  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)44  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)45  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)46  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)选择模型或 provider。47  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)48  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)49  .addHttpApi(V2Api)50  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)51  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)52  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。5354export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")对外暴露模块成员。55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])6061export type RootHttpApiType = typeof RootHttpApi定义数据结构约束。62export type InstanceHttpApiType = typeof InstanceHttpApi定义数据结构约束。
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:103-151：root/event/instance routes 分层。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:103-151 
103// Route tree:104// - rootApiRoutes: typed /global/* and control routes; auth is declared by RootHttpApi.105// - eventApiRoutes/rawInstanceRoutes: raw instance routes; auth and workspace routing happen as router middleware.106// - instanceApiRoutes: schema routes; auth is declared on each group and workspace context is provided below.107// - uiRoute: raw catch-all fallback; auth is router middleware so public static assets can bypass it.108const authOnlyRouterLayer = authorizationRouterMiddleware.layer.pipe(Layer.provide(ServerAuth.Config.defaultLayer))109const httpApiAuthLayer = authorizationLayer.pipe(Layer.provide(ServerAuth.Config.defaultLayer))110const rootApiRoutes = HttpApiBuilder.layer(RootHttpApi).pipe(111  Layer.provide([controlHandlers, globalHandlers]),112  Layer.provide(schemaErrorLayer),113  Layer.provide(httpApiAuthLayer),114)115const instanceRouterLayer = authorizationRouterMiddleware116  .combine(instanceRouterMiddleware)117  .combine(workspaceRouterMiddleware)118  .layer.pipe(Layer.provide(Socket.layerWebSocketConstructorGlobal), Layer.provide(ServerAuth.Config.defaultLayer))读写本地文件。119const eventApiRoutes = HttpApiBuilder.layer(EventApi).pipe(120  Layer.provide(eventHandlers),121  Layer.provide(instanceRouterLayer),122)123const instanceApiRoutes = HttpApiBuilder.layer(InstanceHttpApi).pipe(124  Layer.provide([125    configHandlers,126    experimentalHandlers,127    fileHandlers,128    instanceHandlers,129    mcpHandlers,130    projectHandlers,131    ptyHandlers,132    questionHandlers,133    permissionHandlers,134    providerHandlers,选择模型或 provider。135    sessionHandlers,136    syncHandlers,137    v2Handlers,138    tuiHandlers,139    workspaceHandlers,140  ]),141)142143const rawInstanceRoutes = Layer.mergeAll(ptyConnectRoute).pipe(Layer.provide(instanceRouterLayer))144const instanceRoutes = Layer.mergeAll(rawInstanceRoutes, instanceApiRoutes).pipe(145  Layer.provide([146    httpApiAuthLayer,147    workspaceRoutingLayer.pipe(Layer.provide(Socket.layerWebSocketConstructorGlobal)),读写本地文件。148    instanceContextLayer,149    schemaErrorLayer,150  ]),151)

182export function createRoutes(对外暴露模块成员。183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(返回给上一层。186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,处理语言服务诊断。201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,调用插件扩展点。206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。208      Provider.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,读写本地文件。234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )

9export const EventApi = HttpApi.make("event").add(对外暴露模块成员。10  HttpApiGroup.make("event")11    .add(12      HttpApiEndpoint.get("subscribe", EventPaths.event, {13        query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,14        success: Schema.String.pipe(HttpApiSchema.asText({ contentType: "text/event-stream" })),定义并校验数据形状。15      }).annotateMerge(16        OpenApi.annotations({17          identifier: "event.subscribe",订阅运行时事件。18          summary: "Subscribe to events",19          description: "Get events",20        }),21      ),22    )23    .annotateMerge(OpenApi.annotations({ title: "event", description: "Instance event stream route." })),24)
  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53：SSE event response。
packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {定义一段可复用逻辑。22  return Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(等待 Effect 结果。28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(返回给上一层。37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),Effect 异步工作流。43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })
  1. packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57：JS SDK client wrapper。
packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {创建 SDK 客户端。34  if (!config?.fetch) {按条件进入分支。35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)返回给上一层。39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {按条件进入分支。47    config.headers = {读取运行配置。48      ...config.headers,读取运行配置。49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),读取运行配置。50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)创建 SDK 客户端。54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })返回给上一层。57}
  1. packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-134：启动 server/TUI 的 SDK helper。
packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-134 
22export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {对外暴露模块成员。23  options = Object.assign(24    {25      hostname: "127.0.0.1",26      port: 4096,27      timeout: 5000,28    },29    options ?? {},30  )3132  const args = [`serve`, `--hostname=${options.hostname}`, `--port=${options.port}`]33  if (options.config?.logLevel) args.push(`--log-level=${options.config.logLevel}`)读取运行配置。3435  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {36    env: {37      ...process.env,38      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options.config ?? {}),39    },40  })41  let clear = () => {}4243  const url = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {44    const id = setTimeout(() => {45      clear()46      stop(proc)47      reject(new Error(`Timeout waiting for server to start after ${options.timeout}ms`))48    }, options.timeout)49    let output = ""50    let resolved = false51    proc.stdout?.on("data", (chunk) => {52      if (resolved) return按条件进入分支。53      output += chunk.toString()54      const lines = output.split("\n")55      for (const line of lines) {遍历集合。56        if (line.startsWith("opencode server listening")) {按条件进入分支。57          const match = line.match(/on\s+(https?:\/\/[^\s]+)/)58          if (!match) {按条件进入分支。59            clear()60            stop(proc)61            clearTimeout(id)62            reject(new Error(`Failed to parse server url from output: ${line}`))63            return返回给上一层。64          }65          clearTimeout(id)66          resolved = true67          resolve(match[1]!)68          return返回给上一层。69        }70      }71    })72    proc.stderr?.on("data", (chunk) => {73      output += chunk.toString()74    })75    proc.on("exit", (code) => {76      clearTimeout(id)77      let msg = `Server exited with code ${code}`78      if (output.trim()) {按条件进入分支。79        msg += `\nServer output: ${output}`80      }81      reject(new Error(msg))82    })83    proc.on("error", (error) => {84      clearTimeout(id)85      reject(error)86    })87    clear = bindAbort(proc, options.signal, () => {88      clearTimeout(id)89      reject(options.signal?.reason)90    })91  })9293  return {返回给上一层。94    url,95    close() {96      clear()97      stop(proc)98    },99  }100}101102export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {对外暴露模块成员。103  const args = []104105  if (options?.project) {按条件进入分支。106    args.push(`--project=${options.project}`)107  }108  if (options?.model) {按条件进入分支。109    args.push(`--model=${options.model}`)110  }111  if (options?.session) {按条件进入分支。112    args.push(`--session=${options.session}`)113  }114  if (options?.agent) {按条件进入分支。115    args.push(`--agent=${options.agent}`)116  }117118  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {119    stdio: "inherit",120    env: {121      ...process.env,122      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options?.config ?? {}),123    },124  })125126  const clear = bindAbort(proc, options?.signal)127128  return {返回给上一层。129    close() {130      clear()131      stop(proc)132    },133  }134}

126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))Effect 异步工作流。127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),复用后端请求入口。133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()读取运行配置。135        const input: PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {调用插件扩展点。142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")返回给上一层。147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }
  1. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274：Plugin.trigger。
packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <调用插件扩展点。262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output按条件进入分支。267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {调用插件扩展点。269        const fn = hook[name] as any调用插件扩展点。270        if (!fn) continue按条件进入分支。271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))Effect 异步工作流。272      }273      return output返回给上一层。274    })
