56export type PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。57  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>创建 SDK 客户端。58  project: Project59  directory: string60  worktree: string61  experimental_workspace: {62    register(type: string, adapter: WorkspaceAdapter): void63  }64  serverUrl: URL65  $: BunShell66}6768export type PluginOptions = Record<string, unknown>调用插件扩展点。6970export type Config = Omit<SDKConfig, "plugin"> & {定义数据结构约束。71  plugin?: Array<string | [string, PluginOptions]>调用插件扩展点。72}7374export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput, options?: PluginOptions) => Promise<Hooks>调用插件扩展点。7576export type PluginModule = {调用插件扩展点。77  id?: string78  server: Plugin调用插件扩展点。79  tui?: never80}

6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路

Section titled “6. 用户输入到 agent 行动的整体链路”

6.1 API group 组合

Section titled “6.1 API group 组合”
1export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")对外暴露模块成员。2  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)3  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)读写本地文件。4  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。5  .middleware(Authorization)执行前先处理中间件。67export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")对外暴露模块成员。8  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)9  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)10  .addHttpApi(FileApi)11  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)12  .addHttpApi(McpApi)13  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)14  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)15  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)16  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)17  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)选择模型或 provider。18  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)19  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)20  .addHttpApi(V2Api)21  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)22  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)23  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。2425export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")对外暴露模块成员。26  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)27  .addHttpApi(EventApi)28  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)29  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-59

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts:30-59 
30export const RootHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-root")对外暴露模块成员。31  .addHttpApi(ControlApi)32  .addHttpApi(GlobalApi)读写本地文件。33  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。34  .middleware(Authorization)执行前先处理中间件。3536export const InstanceHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode-instance")对外暴露模块成员。37  .addHttpApi(ConfigApi)38  .addHttpApi(ExperimentalApi)39  .addHttpApi(FileApi)40  .addHttpApi(InstanceApi)41  .addHttpApi(McpApi)42  .addHttpApi(ProjectApi)43  .addHttpApi(PtyApi)44  .addHttpApi(QuestionApi)45  .addHttpApi(PermissionApi)46  .addHttpApi(ProviderApi)选择模型或 provider。47  .addHttpApi(SessionApi)48  .addHttpApi(SyncApi)49  .addHttpApi(V2Api)50  .addHttpApi(TuiApi)51  .addHttpApi(WorkspaceApi)52  .middleware(SchemaErrorMiddleware)执行前先处理中间件。5354export const OpenCodeHttpApi = HttpApi.make("opencode")对外暴露模块成员。55  .addHttpApi(RootHttpApi)56  .addHttpApi(EventApi)57  .addHttpApi(InstanceHttpApi)58  .addHttpApi(PtyConnectApi)59  .annotate(HttpApi.AdditionalSchemas, [EventSchema, ...SyncEventSchemas])

这说明 HTTP API 是模块化 group，不是一个巨大 controller 文件。

6.2 API route 到 runtime services

Section titled “6.2 API route 到 runtime services”
1export function createRoutes(对外暴露模块成员。2  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,3): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {4  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(返回给上一层。5    Layer.provide([6      errorLayer,7      compressionLayer,8      corsVaryFix,9      fenceLayer,10      cors(corsOptions),11      Account.defaultLayer,12      Agent.defaultLayer,13      Auth.defaultLayer,14      Command.defaultLayer,15      Config.defaultLayer,16      File.defaultLayer,17      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,18      Format.defaultLayer,19      LSP.defaultLayer,处理语言服务诊断。20      MCP.defaultLayer,21      Permission.defaultLayer,22      Plugin.defaultLayer,调用插件扩展点。23      Project.defaultLayer,24      Provider.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。25      Pty.defaultLayer,26      Question.defaultLayer,27      Session.defaultLayer,28      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,29      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,30      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,31      ...32    ]),33    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),34    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),35  )36}

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts:182-240 
182export function createRoutes(对外暴露模块成员。183  corsOptions?: CorsOptions,184): Layer.Layer<never, EffectConfig.ConfigError, RouteRequirements> {185  return Layer.mergeAll(rootApiRoutes, eventApiRoutes, instanceRoutes, docRoute, uiRoute).pipe(返回给上一层。186    Layer.provide([187      errorLayer,188      compressionLayer,189      corsVaryFix,190      fenceLayer,191      cors(corsOptions),192      Account.defaultLayer,193      Agent.defaultLayer,194      Auth.defaultLayer,195      Command.defaultLayer,196      Config.defaultLayer,197      File.defaultLayer,198      FileWatcher.defaultLayer,199      Format.defaultLayer,200      LSP.defaultLayer,处理语言服务诊断。201      Installation.defaultLayer,202      MCP.defaultLayer,203      ModelsDev.defaultLayer,204      Permission.defaultLayer,205      Plugin.defaultLayer,调用插件扩展点。206      Project.defaultLayer,207      ProviderAuth.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。208      Provider.defaultLayer,选择模型或 provider。209      Pty.defaultLayer,210      PtyTicket.defaultLayer,211      Question.defaultLayer,212      Ripgrep.defaultLayer,213      RuntimeFlags.defaultLayer,214      Session.defaultLayer,215      SessionCompaction.defaultLayer,216      SessionPrompt.defaultLayer,217      SessionRevert.defaultLayer,218      SessionShare.defaultLayer,219      SessionRunState.defaultLayer,220      SessionStatus.defaultLayer,221      SessionSummary.defaultLayer,222      ShareNext.defaultLayer,223      Snapshot.defaultLayer,224      SyncEvent.defaultLayer,225      EventV2Bridge.defaultLayer,226      Skill.defaultLayer,227      Todo.defaultLayer,228      ToolRegistry.defaultLayer,229      Vcs.defaultLayer,230      Workspace.defaultLayer,231      Worktree.appLayer,232      Bus.layer,233      AppFileSystem.defaultLayer,读写本地文件。234      FetchHttpClient.layer,235      HttpServer.layerServices,236    ]),237    Layer.provide(Layer.succeed(CorsConfig)(corsOptions)),238    Layer.provide(InstanceLayer.layer),239    Layer.provide(Observability.layer),240  )

Java 类比：这是把 Controller、Service、Repository、EventBus、ToolRegistry、Provider 等全部放进 Spring ApplicationContext。

6.3 in-process server

Section titled “6.3 in-process server”
1export const Default = lazy(() => {对外暴露模块成员。2  const handler = HttpApiApp.webHandler().handler3  const app: ServerApp = {4    fetch: (request: Request) => handler(request, HttpApiApp.context),5    request(input, init) {6      return app.fetch(input instanceof Request ? input : new Request(new URL(input, "http://localhost"), init))返回给上一层。7    },8  }9  return { app }返回给上一层。10})

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67

packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts packages/opencode/src/server/server.ts:58-67 
58export const Default = lazy(() => {对外暴露模块成员。59  const handler = HttpApiApp.webHandler().handler60  const app: ServerApp = {61    fetch: (request: Request) => handler(request, HttpApiApp.context),62    request(input, init) {63      return app.fetch(input instanceof Request ? input : new Request(new URL(input, "http://localhost"), init))返回给上一层。64    },65  }66  return { app }返回给上一层。67})

这就是为什么 CLI/TUI local 模式可以用 Server.Default().app.fetch，不必真的监听端口。

6.4 Session API endpoint

Section titled “6.4 Session API endpoint”
1HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {2  params: { sessionID: SessionID },3  query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,4  payload: PromptPayload,5  success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。6  error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],7}).annotateMerge(8  OpenApi.annotations({9    identifier: "session.prompt",把输入交给会话主流程。10    summary: "Send message",11    description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",12  }),13)

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-324 
312        HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {313          params: { sessionID: SessionID },314          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,315          payload: PromptPayload,316          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。317          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],318        }).annotateMerge(319          OpenApi.annotations({320            identifier: "session.prompt",把输入交给会话主流程。321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324        ),

command 和 shell 也是同一组 session API：

1HttpApiEndpoint.post("command", SessionPaths.command, { ... })处理命令执行。2HttpApiEndpoint.post("shell", SessionPaths.shell, { ... })处理命令执行。

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:339-363

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:339-363 
339        HttpApiEndpoint.post("command", SessionPaths.command, {处理命令执行。340          params: { sessionID: SessionID },341          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,342          payload: CommandPayload,343          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。344          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],345        }).annotateMerge(346          OpenApi.annotations({347            identifier: "session.command",执行内置 session 命令。348            summary: "Send command",处理命令执行。349            description: "Send a new command to a session for execution by the AI assistant.",处理命令执行。350          }),351        ),352        HttpApiEndpoint.post("shell", SessionPaths.shell, {处理命令执行。353          params: { sessionID: SessionID },354          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,355          payload: ShellPayload,356          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。357          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],358        }).annotateMerge(359          OpenApi.annotations({360            identifier: "session.shell",处理命令执行。361            summary: "Run shell command",处理命令执行。362            description: "Execute a shell command within the session context and return the AI's response.",处理命令执行。363          }),

6.5 Event API / SSE

Section titled “6.5 Event API / SSE”
1export const EventApi = HttpApi.make("event").add(对外暴露模块成员。2  HttpApiGroup.make("event").add(3    HttpApiEndpoint.get("subscribe", EventPaths.event, {4      query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,5      success: Schema.String.pipe(HttpApiSchema.asText({ contentType: "text/event-stream" })),定义并校验数据形状。6    })7  )8)

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts:9-24

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/event.ts:9-24 
9export const EventApi = HttpApi.make("event").add(对外暴露模块成员。10  HttpApiGroup.make("event")11    .add(12      HttpApiEndpoint.get("subscribe", EventPaths.event, {13        query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,14        success: Schema.String.pipe(HttpApiSchema.asText({ contentType: "text/event-stream" })),定义并校验数据形状。15      }).annotateMerge(16        OpenApi.annotations({17          identifier: "event.subscribe",订阅运行时事件。18          summary: "Subscribe to events",19          description: "Get events",20        }),21      ),22    )23    .annotateMerge(OpenApi.annotations({ title: "event", description: "Instance event stream route." })),24)

handler 把 Bus events 和 heartbeat 编成 SSE：

1const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(等待 Effect 结果。2  Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),3)4const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(5  Stream.drop(1),6  Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),7)89return HttpServerResponse.stream(返回给上一层。10  Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(11    Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),12    Stream.map(eventData),13    Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),14    Stream.encodeText,15  ),16  { contentType: "text/event-stream", headers: { "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform" } },17)

路径：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {定义一段可复用逻辑。22  return Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(等待 Effect 结果。28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(返回给上一层。37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),Effect 异步工作流。43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

6.6 JS SDK client wrapper

Section titled “6.6 JS SDK client wrapper”
1export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {创建 SDK 客户端。2  if (!config?.fetch) {按条件进入分支。3    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {4      req.timeout = false5      return fetch(req)返回给上一层。6    }7    config = {8      ...config,9      fetch: customFetch,10    }11  }1213  if (config?.directory) {按条件进入分支。14    config.headers = {读取运行配置。15      ...config.headers,读取运行配置。16      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),读取运行配置。17    }18  }1920  const client = createClient(config)创建 SDK 客户端。21  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))22  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)23  return new OpencodeClient({ client })返回给上一层。24}

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57

packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:33-57 
33export function createOpencodeClient(config?: Config & { directory?: string }) {创建 SDK 客户端。34  if (!config?.fetch) {按条件进入分支。35    const customFetch: any = (req: any) => {36      // @ts-ignore37      req.timeout = false38      return fetch(req)返回给上一层。39    }40    config = {41      ...config,42      fetch: customFetch,43    }44  }4546  if (config?.directory) {按条件进入分支。47    config.headers = {读取运行配置。48      ...config.headers,读取运行配置。49      "x-opencode-directory": encodeURIComponent(config.directory),读取运行配置。50    }51  }5253  const client = createClient(config)创建 SDK 客户端。54  client.interceptors.request.use((request) => rewrite(request, config?.directory))55  client.interceptors.error.use(wrapClientError)56  return new OpencodeClient({ client })返回给上一层。57}

rewrite 会把 GET/HEAD 的 x-opencode-directory 变成 query：

1function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {定义一段可复用逻辑。2  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request按条件进入分支。34  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)5  if (!value) return request按条件进入分支。67  const url = new URL(request.url)8  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {按条件进入分支。9    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)10  }1112  const next = new Request(url, request)13  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")14  return next返回给上一层。15}

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31

packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31 
17function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {定义一段可复用逻辑。18  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request按条件进入分支。1920  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)21  if (!value) return request按条件进入分支。2223  const url = new URL(request.url)24  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {按条件进入分支。25    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)26  }2728  const next = new Request(url, request)29  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")30  return next返回给上一层。31}

6.7 SDK helper 启动 server/TUI

Section titled “6.7 SDK helper 启动 server/TUI”
1export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {对外暴露模块成员。2  options = Object.assign(3    {4      hostname: "127.0.0.1",5      port: 4096,6      timeout: 5000,7    },8    options ?? {},9  )1011  const args = [`serve`, `--hostname=${options.hostname}`, `--port=${options.port}`]12  if (options.config?.logLevel) args.push(`--log-level=${options.config.logLevel}`)读取运行配置。1314  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {15    env: {16      ...process.env,17      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options.config ?? {}),18    },19  })20  ...21}

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-40

packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:22-40 
22export async function createOpencodeServer(options?: ServerOptions) {对外暴露模块成员。23  options = Object.assign(24    {25      hostname: "127.0.0.1",26      port: 4096,27      timeout: 5000,28    },29    options ?? {},30  )3132  const args = [`serve`, `--hostname=${options.hostname}`, `--port=${options.port}`]33  if (options.config?.logLevel) args.push(`--log-level=${options.config.logLevel}`)读取运行配置。3435  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {36    env: {37      ...process.env,38      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options.config ?? {}),39    },40  })

启动 TUI：

1export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {对外暴露模块成员。2  const args = []3  if (options?.project) args.push(`--project=${options.project}`)按条件进入分支。4  if (options?.model) args.push(`--model=${options.model}`)按条件进入分支。5  if (options?.session) args.push(`--session=${options.session}`)按条件进入分支。6  if (options?.agent) args.push(`--agent=${options.agent}`)按条件进入分支。78  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {9    stdio: "inherit",10    env: {11      ...process.env,12      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options?.config ?? {}),13    },14  })15  ...16}

路径：packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:102-134

packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts:102-134 
102export function createOpencodeTui(options?: TuiOptions) {对外暴露模块成员。103  const args = []104105  if (options?.project) {按条件进入分支。106    args.push(`--project=${options.project}`)107  }108  if (options?.model) {按条件进入分支。109    args.push(`--model=${options.model}`)110  }111  if (options?.session) {按条件进入分支。112    args.push(`--session=${options.session}`)113  }114  if (options?.agent) {按条件进入分支。115    args.push(`--agent=${options.agent}`)116  }117118  const proc = launch(`opencode`, args, {119    stdio: "inherit",120    env: {121      ...process.env,122      OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT: JSON.stringify(options?.config ?? {}),123    },124  })125126  const clear = bindAbort(proc, options?.signal)127128  return {返回给上一层。129    close() {130      clear()131      stop(proc)132    },133  }134}

6.8 Plugin service interface 和 trigger

Section titled “6.8 Plugin service interface 和 trigger”
1export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。2  readonly trigger: <调用插件扩展点。3    Name extends TriggerName,4    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],5    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],6  >(7    name: Name,8    input: Input,9    output: Output,10  ) => Effect.Effect<Output>Effect 异步工作流。11  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Hooks[]>Effect 异步工作流。12  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。13}

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:43-55 
43export interface Interface {定义数据结构约束。44  readonly trigger: <调用插件扩展点。45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(49    name: Name,50    input: Input,51    output: Output,52  ) => Effect.Effect<Output>Effect 异步工作流。53  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Hooks[]>Effect 异步工作流。54  readonly init: () => Effect.Effect<void>Effect 异步工作流。55}

插件加载时，OpenCode 给插件的输入：

1const client = createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。2  baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",3  directory: ctx.directory,4  headers: ServerAuth.headers(),5  fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),复用后端请求入口。6})7const input: PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。8  client,9  project: ctx.project,10  worktree: ctx.worktree,11  directory: ctx.directory,12  experimental_workspace: {13    register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {调用插件扩展点。14      registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)15    },16  },17  get serverUrl(): URL {18    return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")返回给上一层。19  },20  $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,21}

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))Effect 异步工作流。127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),复用后端请求入口。133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()读取运行配置。135        const input: PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {调用插件扩展点。142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")返回给上一层。147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }

trigger 执行 hooks：

1const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <Name extends TriggerName>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {调用插件扩展点。2  if (!name) return output按条件进入分支。3  const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。4  for (const hook of s.hooks) {调用插件扩展点。5    const fn = hook[name] as any调用插件扩展点。6    if (!fn) continue按条件进入分支。7    yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))Effect 异步工作流。8  }9  return output返回给上一层。10})

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <调用插件扩展点。262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output按条件进入分支。267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {调用插件扩展点。269        const fn = hook[name] as any调用插件扩展点。270        if (!fn) continue按条件进入分支。271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))Effect 异步工作流。272      }273      return output返回给上一层。274    })

这就是 LLM 章看到的 chat.params、Shell 章看到的 shell.env、Tool 章看到的 tool.execute.before/after 的底层机制。

6.9 对外插件类型

Section titled “6.9 对外插件类型”
1export type PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。2  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>创建 SDK 客户端。3  project: Project4  directory: string5  worktree: string6  experimental_workspace: {7    register(type: string, adapter: WorkspaceAdapter): void8  }9  serverUrl: URL10  $: BunShell11}1213export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput, options?: PluginOptions) => Promise<Hooks>调用插件扩展点。1415export type PluginModule = {调用插件扩展点。16  id?: string17  server: Plugin调用插件扩展点。18  tui?: never19}

路径：packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-80

packages/plugin/src/index.ts packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-80 
56export type PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。57  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>创建 SDK 客户端。58  project: Project59  directory: string60  worktree: string61  experimental_workspace: {62    register(type: string, adapter: WorkspaceAdapter): void63  }64  serverUrl: URL65  $: BunShell66}6768export type PluginOptions = Record<string, unknown>调用插件扩展点。6970export type Config = Omit<SDKConfig, "plugin"> & {定义数据结构约束。71  plugin?: Array<string | [string, PluginOptions]>调用插件扩展点。72}7374export type Plugin = (input: PluginInput, options?: PluginOptions) => Promise<Hooks>调用插件扩展点。7576export type PluginModule = {调用插件扩展点。77  id?: string78  server: Plugin调用插件扩展点。79  tui?: never80}

插件包不是随便导出函数，而是有类型约束的 server plugin module。

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 API 组合不是目录树，而是 typed contract

Section titled “7.1 API 组合不是目录树，而是 typed contract”

api.ts 通过 HttpApi.make().addHttpApi() 组合 typed endpoint group。每个 group 定义 endpoint payload、success、error 和 OpenAPI annotations。Java 开发者可以理解为 Controller 接口 + OpenAPI schema。

7.2 server routes 是 runtime 装配点

Section titled “7.2 server routes 是 runtime 装配点”

server.ts 的 createRoutes 是非常重要的架构中心：它同时合并 route layer 和 runtime service layer。agent 项目的 HTTP 层不是薄薄的 controller，它需要把 SessionPrompt、ToolRegistry、Provider、Permission、LSP、MCP、Plugin 全部装配进请求上下文。

7.3 SDK 是所有 UI 的公共语言

Section titled “7.3 SDK 是所有 UI 的公共语言”

CLI/TUI/Web/Desktop/Plugin 都倾向于使用 SDK，而不是手写 fetch。这样 session.prompt、permission.reply、event.subscribe、global.event 等调用方式一致。源码证据：

  • CLI run imports createOpencodeClient。来源：packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:23。

    packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:23 
    23import { createOpencodeClient, type OpencodeClient, type ToolPart } from "@opencode-ai/sdk/v2"引入需要的模块。

  • TUI SDK context 调用 createOpencodeClient。来源：packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sdk.tsx:1-31。

    packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sdk.tsx packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/context/sdk.tsx:1-31 
    1import { createOpencodeClient } from "@opencode-ai/sdk/v2"引入需要的模块。2import type { GlobalEvent } from "@opencode-ai/sdk/v2"引入需要的模块。3import { createSimpleContext } from "./helper"引入需要的模块。4import { createGlobalEmitter } from "@solid-primitives/event-bus"引入需要的模块。5import { Flag } from "@opencode-ai/core/flag/flag"引入需要的模块。6import { batch, onCleanup, onMount } from "solid-js"引入需要的模块。78export type EventSource = {定义数据结构约束。9  subscribe: (handler: (event: GlobalEvent) => void) => Promise<() => void>读写本地文件。10}1112export const { use: useSDK, provider: SDKProvider } = createSimpleContext({选择模型或 provider。13  name: "SDK",14  init: (props: {15    url: string16    directory?: string17    fetch?: typeof fetch18    headers?: RequestInit["headers"]19    events?: EventSource20  }) => {21    const abort = new AbortController()用于中断运行任务。22    let sse: AbortController | undefined用于中断运行任务。2324    function createSDK() {定义一段可复用逻辑。25      return createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。26        baseUrl: props.url,27        signal: abort.signal,28        directory: props.directory,29        fetch: props.fetch,30        headers: props.headers,31      })

  • Plugin service 给插件注入 SDK client。来源：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150。

    packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:126-150 
    126        const { Server } = yield* Effect.promise(() => import("../server/server"))Effect 异步工作流。127128        const client = createOpencodeClient({创建 SDK 客户端。129          baseUrl: "http://localhost:4096",130          directory: ctx.directory,131          headers: ServerAuth.headers(),132          fetch: async (...args) => Server.Default().app.fetch(...args),复用后端请求入口。133        })134        const cfg = yield* config.get()读取运行配置。135        const input: PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。136          client,137          project: ctx.project,138          worktree: ctx.worktree,139          directory: ctx.directory,140          experimental_workspace: {141            register(type: string, adapter: PluginWorkspaceAdapter) {调用插件扩展点。142              registerAdapter(ctx.project.id, type, adapter as WorkspaceAdapter)143            },144          },145          get serverUrl(): URL {146            return Server.url ?? new URL("http://localhost:4096")返回给上一层。147          },148          // @ts-expect-error149          $: typeof Bun === "undefined" ? undefined : Bun.$,150        }

7.4 Event API 是 UI 实时性的基础

Section titled “7.4 Event API 是 UI 实时性的基础”

SSE handler 先发 server.connected，再合并 bus events 和 heartbeat。这个设计避免 UI 只能靠轮询拿状态。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53。

packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {定义一段可复用逻辑。22  return Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(等待 Effect 结果。28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(返回给上一层。37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),Effect 异步工作流。43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

7.5 Plugin 是受控扩展，不是随意 monkey patch

Section titled “7.5 Plugin 是受控扩展，不是随意 monkey patch”

Plugin 系统加载 hooks，然后在运行时显式调用 Plugin.trigger(name, input, output)。插件只能在 OpenCode 暴露的 hook 点影响流程，不是随意改内部对象。来源：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274。

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:261-274 
261    const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <调用插件扩展点。262      Name extends TriggerName,263      Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],264      Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],265    >(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {266      if (!name) return output按条件进入分支。267      const s = yield* InstanceState.get(state)等待 Effect 结果。268      for (const hook of s.hooks) {调用插件扩展点。269        const fn = hook[name] as any调用插件扩展点。270        if (!fn) continue按条件进入分支。271        yield* Effect.promise(async () => fn(input, output))Effect 异步工作流。272      }273      return output返回给上一层。274    })

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”

generic + keyof + conditional mapped type

Section titled “generic + keyof + conditional mapped type”
1type TriggerName = {定义数据结构约束。2  [K in keyof Hooks]-?: NonNullable<Hooks[K]> extends (input: any, output: any) => Promise<void> ? K : never3}[keyof Hooks]

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:38-41

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:38-41 
38// Hook names that follow the (input, output) => Promise<void> trigger pattern39type TriggerName = {定义数据结构约束。40  [K in keyof Hooks]-?: NonNullable<Hooks[K]> extends (input: any, output: any) => Promise<void> ? K : never41}[keyof Hooks]

这段从 Hooks 中筛选出符合 (input, output) => Promise<void> 形状的 hook 名。Java 没有直接等价物，这是 TS 类型编程。

Parameters

Section titled “Parameters”
1Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0]2Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1]

路径：packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:45-48

packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:45-48 
45    Name extends TriggerName,46    Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],47    Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],48  >(

从 hook 函数类型中抽取第 0、第 1 个参数类型。Java 泛型做不到这么直接。

namespace

Section titled “namespace”
1export namespace ServerConnection {对外暴露模块成员。2  export type Http = ...定义数据结构约束。3  export const key = (conn: Any): Key => { ... }对外暴露模块成员。4}

路径：packages/app/src/context/server.tsx:63-120

packages/app/src/context/server.tsx packages/app/src/context/server.tsx:63-120 
63export namespace ServerConnection {对外暴露模块成员。64  type Base = { displayName?: string }定义数据结构约束。6566  export type HttpBase = {定义数据结构约束。67    url: string68    username?: string69    password?: string70  }7172  // Regular web connections73  export type Http = {定义数据结构约束。74    type: "http"75    http: HttpBase76    authToken?: boolean77  } & Base7879  export type Sidecar = {定义数据结构约束。80    type: "sidecar"81    http: HttpBase82  } & (83    | // Regular desktop server84    { variant: "base" }85    // WSL server (windows only)86    | {87        variant: "wsl"88        distro: string89      }90  ) &91    Base9293  // Remote server desktop can SSH into94  export type Ssh = {定义数据结构约束。95    type: "ssh"96    host: string97    // SSH client exposes an HTTP server for the app to use as a proxy98    http: HttpBase99  } & Base100101  export type Any =定义数据结构约束。102    | Http103    // All these are desktop-only104    | (Sidecar | Ssh)105106  export const key = (conn: Any): Key => {对外暴露模块成员。107    switch (conn.type) {108      case "http":109        return Key.make(conn.http.url)返回给上一层。110      case "sidecar": {111        if (conn.variant === "wsl") return Key.make(`wsl:${conn.distro}`)按条件进入分支。112        return Key.make("sidecar")返回给上一层。113      }114      case "ssh":115        return Key.make(`ssh:${conn.host}`)返回给上一层。116    }117  }118119  export type Key = string & { _brand: "Key" }定义数据结构约束。120  export const Key = { make: (v: string) => v as Key }对外暴露模块成员。

TS namespace 可以把类型和函数放在同一命名空间下。现代项目更常用 module export，但这里用于组织相关类型/函数。

function overload

Section titled “function overload”

lsp/launch.ts 中有 overload，本章 SDK 虽未深入，但你在 server/desktop 里会看到类似 API shape。TS overload 用多个签名描述同一函数的不同调用形式，Java 用方法重载。

ReturnType

Section titled “ReturnType”
1client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>创建 SDK 客户端。

路径：packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-58

packages/plugin/src/index.ts packages/plugin/src/index.ts:56-58 
56export type PluginInput = {调用插件扩展点。57  client: ReturnType<typeof createOpencodeClient>创建 SDK 客户端。58  project: Project

从函数返回值推导类型，避免重复定义 SDK client 类型。

async iterator / stream

Section titled “async iterator / stream”

SSE 在 SDK 里通常被消费成 async iterable，UI 用 for await。Java 类比 Reactive Streams。

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”
  • Typed API contract：endpoint 有 payload/success/error schema。
  • Layered service assembly：HTTP routes 和 runtime services 通过 Effect Layer 装配。
  • Generated SDK + wrapper：生成客户端再加目录、错误处理、fetch 适配。
  • SSE event bus bridge：Bus events 通过 SSE 变成外部可消费 stream。
  • Plugin SPI：插件通过 typed hooks 接入。
  • In-process adapter：Server.Default().app.fetch 让插件/CLI 不必起外部 HTTP。
  • Separation of extension points：tools、provider params、shell env、events 各自有 hook。

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”

  • 和 Tool：ToolRegistry 会读取 plugin tools；插件 hook 可在 tool definition/execution 前后介入。来源：packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:219-224、packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:90-116。

    packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts packages/opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:219-224 
    219            custom.push(fromPlugin(id, def))调用插件扩展点。220          }221        }222223        yield* config.get()读取运行配置。224        const questionEnabled = ["app", "cli", "desktop"].includes(flags.client) || flags.enableQuestionTool
    packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:90-116 
    90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)工具真正执行入口。94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(调用插件扩展点。104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {按条件进入分支。109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)等待 Effect 结果。110            }111            return output返回给上一层。112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }

  • 和 Provider：LLM 层调用 chat.params、chat.headers、system transform 等 plugin hooks。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:126-202。

    packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:126-202 
    126      const header = system[0]127      yield* plugin.trigger(调用插件扩展点。128        "experimental.chat.system.transform",129        { sessionID: input.sessionID, model: input.model },选择模型或 provider。130        { system },131      )132      // rejoin to maintain 2-part structure for caching if header unchanged133      if (system.length > 2 && system[0] === header) {按条件进入分支。134        const rest = system.slice(1)135        system.length = 0136        system.push(header, rest.join("\n"))137      }138139      const variant =140        !input.small && input.model.variants && input.user.model.variant141          ? input.model.variants[input.user.model.variant]142          : {}143      const base = input.small144        ? ProviderTransform.smallOptions(input.model)选择模型或 provider。145        : ProviderTransform.options({选择模型或 provider。146            model: input.model,选择模型或 provider。147            sessionID: input.sessionID,148            providerOptions: item.options,选择模型或 provider。149          })150      const options = mergeOptions(mergeOptions(mergeOptions(base, input.model.options), input.agent.options), variant)151      if (isOpenaiOauth) {按条件进入分支。152        options.instructions = system.join("\n")153      }154155      const isWorkflow = language instanceof GitLabWorkflowLanguageModel156      const messages = isOpenaiOauth157        ? input.messages158        : isWorkflow159          ? input.messages160          : [161              ...system.map(162                (x): ModelMessage => ({163                  role: "system",164                  content: x,165                }),166              ),167              ...input.messages,168            ]169170      const params = yield* plugin.trigger(调用插件扩展点。171        "chat.params",172        {173          sessionID: input.sessionID,174          agent: input.agent.name,175          model: input.model,选择模型或 provider。176          provider: item,选择模型或 provider。177          message: input.user,178        },179        {180          temperature: input.model.capabilities.temperature181            ? (input.agent.temperature ?? ProviderTransform.temperature(input.model))选择模型或 provider。182            : undefined,183          topP: input.agent.topP ?? ProviderTransform.topP(input.model),选择模型或 provider。184          topK: ProviderTransform.topK(input.model),选择模型或 provider。185          maxOutputTokens: ProviderTransform.maxOutputTokens(input.model, flags.outputTokenMax),选择模型或 provider。186          options,187        },188      )189190      const { headers } = yield* plugin.trigger(调用插件扩展点。191        "chat.headers",192        {193          sessionID: input.sessionID,194          agent: input.agent.name,195          model: input.model,选择模型或 provider。196          provider: item,选择模型或 provider。197          message: input.user,198        },199        {200          headers: {},201        },202      )

  • 和 Session：Session API 暴露 prompt/command/shell/revert/permissionRespond 等 endpoint。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-405。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts:312-405 
    312        HttpApiEndpoint.post("prompt", SessionPaths.prompt, {313          params: { sessionID: SessionID },314          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,315          payload: PromptPayload,316          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。317          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],318        }).annotateMerge(319          OpenApi.annotations({320            identifier: "session.prompt",把输入交给会话主流程。321            summary: "Send message",322            description: "Create and send a new message to a session, streaming the AI response.",323          }),324        ),325        HttpApiEndpoint.post("promptAsync", SessionPaths.promptAsync, {326          params: { sessionID: SessionID },327          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,328          payload: PromptPayload,329          success: described(HttpApiSchema.NoContent, "Prompt accepted"),定义并校验数据形状。330          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],331        }).annotateMerge(332          OpenApi.annotations({333            identifier: "session.prompt_async",把输入交给会话主流程。334            summary: "Send async message",335            description:336              "Create and send a new message to a session asynchronously, starting the session if needed and returning immediately.",337          }),338        ),339        HttpApiEndpoint.post("command", SessionPaths.command, {处理命令执行。340          params: { sessionID: SessionID },341          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,342          payload: CommandPayload,343          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。344          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],345        }).annotateMerge(346          OpenApi.annotations({347            identifier: "session.command",执行内置 session 命令。348            summary: "Send command",处理命令执行。349            description: "Send a new command to a session for execution by the AI assistant.",处理命令执行。350          }),351        ),352        HttpApiEndpoint.post("shell", SessionPaths.shell, {处理命令执行。353          params: { sessionID: SessionID },354          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,355          payload: ShellPayload,356          success: described(MessageV2.WithParts, "Created message"),会话消息片段结构。357          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],358        }).annotateMerge(359          OpenApi.annotations({360            identifier: "session.shell",处理命令执行。361            summary: "Run shell command",处理命令执行。362            description: "Execute a shell command within the session context and return the AI's response.",处理命令执行。363          }),364        ),365        HttpApiEndpoint.post("revert", SessionPaths.revert, {366          params: { sessionID: SessionID },367          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,368          payload: RevertPayload,369          success: described(Session.Info, "Updated session"),370          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],371        }).annotateMerge(372          OpenApi.annotations({373            identifier: "session.revert",374            summary: "Revert message",375            description:376              "Revert a specific message in a session, undoing its effects and restoring the previous state.",377          }),378        ),379        HttpApiEndpoint.post("unrevert", SessionPaths.unrevert, {380          params: { sessionID: SessionID },381          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,382          success: described(Session.Info, "Updated session"),383          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],384        }).annotateMerge(385          OpenApi.annotations({386            identifier: "session.unrevert",387            summary: "Restore reverted messages",388            description: "Restore all previously reverted messages in a session.",389          }),390        ),391        HttpApiEndpoint.post("permissionRespond", SessionPaths.permissions, {392          params: { sessionID: SessionID, permissionID: PermissionID },393          query: WorkspaceRoutingQuery,394          payload: PermissionResponsePayload,395          success: described(Schema.Boolean, "Permission processed successfully"),定义并校验数据形状。396          error: [HttpApiError.BadRequest, ApiNotFoundError],397        }).annotateMerge(398          OpenApi.annotations({399            identifier: "permission.respond",400            summary: "Respond to permission",401            description: "Approve or deny a permission request from the AI assistant.",402            deprecated: true,403          }),404        ),405        HttpApiEndpoint.delete("deleteMessage", SessionPaths.deleteMessage, {

  • 和文件系统：FileApi、WorkspaceRoutingQuery、directory header/query 让同一 server 能按工作区路由请求。来源：packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31。

    packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts:17-31 
    17function rewrite(request: Request, directory?: string) {定义一段可复用逻辑。18  if (request.method !== "GET" && request.method !== "HEAD") return request按条件进入分支。1920  const value = pick(request.headers.get("x-opencode-directory"), directory)21  if (!value) return request按条件进入分支。2223  const url = new URL(request.url)24  if (!url.searchParams.has("directory")) {按条件进入分支。25    url.searchParams.set("directory", value)26  }2728  const next = new Request(url, request)29  next.headers.delete("x-opencode-directory")30  return next返回给上一层。31}

  • 和 UI：Event API/SSE 是 UI 同步状态的基础。来源：packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53。

    packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts:21-53 
    21function eventResponse(bus: Bus.Interface) {定义一段可复用逻辑。22  return Effect.gen(function* () {Effect 异步工作流。23    // Subscribe eagerly: the bus subscription is acquired in the request scope24    // at this yield, so any publish from now on is queued for the body-pump25    // fiber to drain — closing the race where Stream.concat(server.connected,26    // lazy-subscribe) used to drop publishes in the prefix-consume window.27    const events = (yield* bus.subscribeAll()).pipe(等待 Effect 结果。28      Stream.takeUntil((event) => event.type === Bus.InstanceDisposed.type),29    )30    const heartbeat = Stream.tick("10 seconds").pipe(31      Stream.drop(1),32      Stream.map(() => ({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.heartbeat", properties: {} })),33    )3435    log.info("event connected")36    return HttpServerResponse.stream(返回给上一层。37      Stream.make({ id: Bus.createID(), type: "server.connected", properties: {} }).pipe(38        Stream.concat(events.pipe(Stream.merge(heartbeat, { haltStrategy: "left" }))),39        Stream.map(eventData),40        Stream.pipeThroughChannel(Sse.encode()),41        Stream.encodeText,42        Stream.ensuring(Effect.sync(() => log.info("event disconnected"))),Effect 异步工作流。43      ),44      {45        contentType: "text/event-stream",46        headers: {47          "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",48          "X-Accel-Buffering": "no",49          "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",50        },51      },52    )53  })

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

mini agent 至少要有这三层：

1// 1. HTTP API2app.post("/session/:id/prompt", async (req) => {3  return sessionPrompt.prompt(req.params.id, await req.json())返回给上一层。4})56app.get("/event", async () => {7  return sse(bus.subscribeAll())返回给上一层。8})910// 2. SDK11export function createMiniClient(baseUrl: string) {对外暴露模块成员。12  return {返回给上一层。13    session: {14      prompt: (id: string, body: unknown) => fetch(`${baseUrl}/session/${id}/prompt`, { method: "POST", body: JSON.stringify(body) }),15    },16    event: () => connectSse(`${baseUrl}/event`),17  }18}1920// 3. Plugin hooks21const hooks: Hooks[] = []调用插件扩展点。22async function trigger(name, input, output) {调用插件扩展点。23  for (const hook of hooks) await hook[name]?.(input, output)调用插件扩展点。24  return output返回给上一层。25}

实现顺序：

  1. POST /session/:id/prompt。
  2. GET /event SSE。
  3. JS SDK wrapper。
  4. permission reply endpoint。
  5. plugin hook registry。
  6. plugin tool extension。

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

请你不看源码复述：

  1. RootHttpApi、InstanceHttpApi、EventApi 的差异是什么？
  2. 为什么 SDK client 要处理 directory header/query？
  3. Event API 为什么要加 heartbeat？
  4. PluginInput 为什么要给插件 SDK client 和 serverUrl？
  5. Plugin.trigger 和随意 monkey patch 的差异是什么？

如果说不出来，常见卡点是：

  • 只看到 HTTP endpoint，没有看到 Effect Layer 装配 runtime。
  • 把 SDK 当成简单 fetch wrapper，没有看到 directory routing 和 error interceptor。
  • 把 plugin 理解成“加载脚本”，没有看到 typed hooks 和 trigger 点。

换一种说法：API/SDK 是 agent 的“外部神经接口”，插件是可控的“神经接线板”。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 找到 OpenCodeHttpApi，列出它包含哪些 API group。
  2. 找到 SessionApi.prompt endpoint，写出 params、payload、success。
  3. 找到 createOpencodeClient，解释 directory 是如何传给后端的。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 阅读 createRoutes，把 service layer 分成 session/tool/provider/UI/infra 几组。
  2. 阅读 Event handler，解释为什么先发 server.connected。
  3. 阅读 Plugin service，解释内部插件和外部插件加载路径的差异。

源码追踪题

Section titled “源码追踪题”
  1. 从 client.session.prompt 追到 Session API endpoint，再追到 handler。
  2. 从 sdk.global.event 追到 /event SSE handler。
  3. 从 Plugin.trigger("chat.params") 追到 plugin hook 类型。
  4. 从 plugin tool 定义追到 ToolRegistry 加载。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

写一个 mini SDK/API：

  • POST /prompt
  • POST /permission/:id
  • GET /event
  • createMiniClient
  • registerPlugin(hooks)
  • triggerHook(name, input, output)

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”

建议阅读顺序：

  1. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/api.ts
  2. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/server.ts
  3. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/groups/session.ts
  4. packages/opencode/src/server/routes/instance/httpapi/handlers/event.ts
  5. packages/sdk/js/src/client.ts
  6. packages/sdk/js/src/server.ts
  7. packages/opencode/src/plugin/index.ts
  8. packages/plugin/src/index.ts
  9. packages/plugin/src/tool.ts

15. 面试式自测

Section titled “15. 面试式自测”
  1. API group 和 handler 为什么分开？
  2. 为什么 local CLI/TUI 可以不用监听端口也走 HTTP handler？
  3. 如果要给外部程序提供“创建 session 并 prompt”的能力，应该从 SDK 哪里开始？
  4. 如果要让插件修改 LLM temperature，应该接哪个 hook？
  5. 如果插件执行失败，为什么不应该让整个 server 崩掉？
  6. 如果要给 mini agent 做插件系统，你会先支持 tool plugin，还是 chat.params hook？为什么？

16. 下一步阅读建议

Section titled “16. 下一步阅读建议”

下一章读 “测试与工程化”。API/SDK/Plugin 已经说明系统边界，工程化章会看这个多 package 项目如何构建、检查和测试。

编辑此页

最近更新： 2026年5月21日
